prompt: I need to add security hooks to my existing agent SDK project that block writes to sensitive files and audit all tool usage. TypeScript project. Show me the full hooks configuration with proper typing.

assertions.text: Uses matcher pattern to target specific tools (e.g., 'Write|Edit')
Checks file paths for sensitive patterns (.env, credentials, secrets, etc.)
Implements audit/logging hook that records tool usage
Uses async_: true for non-blocking audit hooks
Shows how to integrate hooks into the agent options object
